Tongs.name: Grab
Tongs.description: Snatch anything without committing to it emotionally.

Tongs.name: Flip
Tongs.description: Turn the situation over fast and keep it moving.

Butter Knife.name: Spread
Butter Knife.description: Smooth things over: peanut butter, jam, and awkward tension.

Butter Knife.name: Slice
Butter Knife.description: Cut through soft problems without making a scene.

Oven Mitt.name: Heat Shield
Oven Mitt.description: Handle hot situations without taking damage.

Oven Mitt.name: Grip
Oven Mitt.description: Hold steady when things get slippery.

Spoon.name: Scoop
Spoon.description: Collect the good stuff and bring it back to the team.

Spoon.name: Stir
Spoon.description: Keep things mixed and prevent emotional clumps.

Fork.name: Pick Up
Fork.description: Lift the pieces and keep going.

Spork.name: Hybrid Mode
Spork.description: Solve problems with whatever tool works right now.

Spork.name: Improvised Etiquette
Spork.description: Function in any setting, no matter how weird.

Mug.name: Warm Up
Mug.description: Boost morale and stabilize the vibe.

Toaster.name: Pop Up
Toaster.description: Surprise reveal at the exact right moment.

Toaster.name: Toast
Toaster.description: Upgrade something basic into something legendary.

Teapot.name: Pour
Teapot.description: Distribute comfort, wisdom, and hot gossip responsibly.

Teapot.name: Steep
Teapot.description: Let things develop before making the call.

Colander.name: Drain
Colander.description: Remove the nonsense and keep what matters.

Colander.name: Rinse
Colander.description: Clean up the situation without rewriting history.

Rolling Pin.name: Flatten
Rolling Pin.description: Smooth out complications with firm efficiency.

Rolling Pin.name: Roll Out
Rolling Pin.description: Expand plans fast and make them workable.

Ice Cube Tray.name: Freeze
Ice Cube Tray.description: Lock in a plan before it melts.

Ice Cube Tray.name: Pop Out
Ice Cube Tray.description: Deliver quick solutions in neat little squares.

Cheese Grater.name: Shred
Cheese Grater.description: Break big problems into manageable pieces.

Cheese Grater.name: Zest
Cheese Grater.description: Add just enough extra to make it interesting.

Dish Sponge.name: Absorb
Dish Sponge.description: Soak up messes so others don't have to.

Whisk.name: Blend
Whisk.description: Combine different ideas into one workable plan.

Tape.name: Stick
Tape.description: Hold things together longer than they deserve.

Tape.name: Patch
Tape.description: Quick fix now, permanent fix later (maybe).

Pencil.name: Rewrite
Pencil.description: Change direction instantly with minimal drama.

Pen.name: Sign Off
Pen.description: End the debate and ship the decision.

Eraser.name: Reset
Eraser.description: Clear the slate and try again smarter.

Rubber Band.name: Stretch
Rubber Band.description: Adapt to changing demands without snapping.

Rubber Band.name: Snap Back
Rubber Band.description: Return to center when chaos pushes too far.

Coin.name: Toll
Coin.description: Pay the price to move forward.

Bottle Cap.name: Pop
Bottle Cap.description: Open the moment with a satisfying click.

Hammer.name: Nail Down
Hammer.description: Lock the plan in place so it stops drifting.

Screwdriver.name: Turn
Screwdriver.description: Shift the situation one twist at a time.

Screwdriver.name: Tighten
Screwdriver.description: Fix what's loose before it becomes a disaster.

Wrench.name: Clamp
Wrench.description: Hold the line when things start slipping.

Measuring Tape.name: Measure
Measuring Tape.description: Get the facts before the feelings.

Paint Roller.name: Coat
Paint Roller.description: Cover big areas fast with one consistent vibe.

Paint Roller.name: Refresh
Paint Roller.description: Make something old look new again.

Lawn Mower.name: Sweep
Lawn Mower.description: Handle the whole area, not just one patch.

Plunger.name: Unclog
Plunger.description: Fix stuck situations through brute persistence.

Plunger.name: Pressure
Plunger.description: Apply force until the blockage gives up.

Wheelbarrow.name: Carry
Wheelbarrow.description: Move heavy loads without complaining (too much).

Wheelbarrow.name: Haul
Wheelbarrow.description: Transport chaos from Point A to 'not my problem.'

Doorknob.name: Turn
Doorknob.description: Change the outcome with one small move.

Doormat.name: Welcome
Doormat.description: Create safe entry for friends and ideas.

Doormat.name: Wipe
Doormat.description: Remove bad vibes at the door.

Soap Bar.name: Cleanse
Soap Bar.description: Reset the mood and scrub the nonsense.

Soap Bar.name: Slip
Soap Bar.description: Escape awkward situations with surprising agility.

Yo Yo.name: Loop
Yo Yo.description: Return to the plan after wandering off.

Yo Yo.name: Drop
Yo Yo.description: Create drama on purpose (for the trick).

Water Balloon.name: Splash
Water Balloon.description: Disrupt the room with one perfect throw.

Sticky Note.name: Tag
Sticky Note.description: Mark priorities so they can't hide.

Battery.name: Charge
Battery.description: Restore energy to yourself or others.

Battery.name: Boost
Battery.description: Temporary power spike when it matters.

Computer Mouse.name: Drag
Computer Mouse.description: Move the whole problem where you want it.

Fire Extinguisher.name: Contain
Fire Extinguisher.description: Stop a small problem from becoming a legend.

Garden Gnome.name: Curse
Garden Gnome.description: Apply mild chaos to anyone who disrespects the lawn.

Mailbox.name: Deliver
Mailbox.description: Get the message to the right place.

Mailbox.name: Receive
Mailbox.description: Hold incoming chaos until you're ready.

Corded Phone.name: Line Hold
Corded Phone.description: Stay connected even when the world wobbles.

Snow Globe.name: Shake
Snow Globe.description: Stir up the whole world for insight.

Snow Globe.name: Settle
Snow Globe.description: Let the chaos fall into place.

Ice Cream Scoop.name: Serve
Ice Cream Scoop.description: Share the good stuff without hesitation.

Lunchbox.name: Pack
Lunchbox.description: Prepare for the day like a pro.

Pizza Cutter.name: Round Up
Pizza Cutter.description: Keep things moving in a tight circle.

Fridge Magnet.name: Attract
Fridge Magnet.description: Pull ideas together from across the room.

5 Gallon Bucket.name: Contain
5 Gallon Bucket.description: Hold a surprising amount of chaos.

5 Gallon Bucket.name: Carry
5 Gallon Bucket.description: Move the mess without spilling it everywhere.

Toothbrush.name: Scrub
Toothbrush.description: Fix small issues with relentless consistency.

Toothbrush.name: Detail
Toothbrush.description: Handle the fine work others ignore.

Glow Stick.name: Glow
Glow Stick.description: Bring light to the dark moment.

Garden Hose.name: Soak
Garden Hose.description: Flood the situation until it calms down.
